title: simple FPS
description: simple FPS is a very simple FPS boosting modpack that uses sodium to give the player a nice FPS boost
body:
# simple FPS
- here at simple FPS where have the goal to make players have more fps without downloading a BIG modpack with using small amount of mods to make it not use alot of memory on the users and load minecraft faster than before! downloading this modpack will give the user more fps during gameplay
